title: Probably MAOA 4 or 5 repeats: not Warrior Gene
summary: Probably MAOA 4 or 5 repeats: not Warrior Gene.
detail: People with this SNP usually also have either the 4 or 5 repeat (non-Warrior) version of MAOA which makes them less aggressive and less anti-social. If you are male, you inherited this from your mother. Do not confuse this with the completely different warrior/worrier gene.

title: Probably one Warrior Gene and one non-Warrior Gene
summary: Probably one Warrior Gene and one non-Warrior Gene.
detail: Women with this combination usually have the 3 repeat MAOA Warrior Gene on one X chromosome and the 4 or 5 repeat MAOA non-Warrior Gene on the other X chromosome.
